title: My Mom Left Her $400K House To A Church, My Family Mocked Me. So I Watched Them Lose Everything.
description: For 30 years, I paid my mother's mortgage while my siblings called me a martyr. After she died, I discovered she'd left the $400K house to a televangelist's church. I proved undue influence, won it back, and donated a small parlor to a women's shelter, now living rent-free while the pastor faces prison. #InheritanceScam #FamilyBetrayal #JusticeServed
thumb_text: THEY GAVE MY HOME TO A TELEVANGELIST, I WATCHED THEM LOSE IT

thumb_lines.text: I PAID HER MORTGAGE FOR 30 YEARS, THEY CALLED ME A MARTYR
I SUED THE CHURCH FOR UNDUE INFLUENCE
WON THE HOUSE, DONATED A ROOM TO SHELTER
